children.label: i
children.text: specific Indian tribes or recipients that should be prohibited from participating in the program for failure to achieve results; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the period for which such a prohibition should remain in effect; or

children.label: B
children.text: standards and procedures by which Indian tribes or recipients may be prohibited from participating in the program for failure to achieve results.

children.heading: Provision of information to Secretary
children.label: c Provision of information to Secretary
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, recipients participating in the program under this part shall provide such information to the Secretary as the Secretary may request, in sufficient detail and in a timely manner sufficient to ensure that the review and report required by this section is accomplished in a timely manner.
